articles.title: Bitcoin Set For Monster Rally: MicroStrategy’s Upsized $700M Notes Sale Could Thrust Bitcoin To $100K
articles.description: Adding to the bullish momentum, MicroStrategy, the business intelligence company best known for its relentless commitment to stockpiling the benchmark crypto has raised its convertible debt offering to $700 million from $600 million as part of a move to acquire more BTC and boost its cache even further.

articles.title: Adjusted for Inflation, Bitcoin Hasn’t Topped Its All Time High
articles.description: If bitcoin’s an inflation hedge, shouldn’t we adjust it for inflation?

articles.title: First Polygon (MATIC) AggLayer Chain Gets Pyth Oracles Boost
articles.description: Pyth Network integrates its price feeds with Astar zkEVM, the first fully integrated AggLayer chain.

articles.title: Solana Airdrop Meme Coin $SMOG Goes Parabolic As New All-Time Highs Defy Bitcoin Price Correction

articles.title: Cardano Leadership Shakeup? What Charles Hoskinson Has To Say
articles.description: In a series of exchanges that captured the attention of the Cardano community on X (formerly Twitter), Charles Hoskinson addressed speculation about his potential departure from Cardano for the new privacy-focused sidechain, Midnight. The discussion, which also touched on broader community concerns and internal dynamics, was marked by Hoskinson’s direct engagement with community members’...

articles.title: Polygon (MATIC) AggLayer Takes off as Astar Makes zkEVM Move
articles.description: Astar launches the first Ethereum Layer 2 fully integrated with Polygon's AggLayer.

articles.title: Polygon Lands First User of New 'AggLayer,' Inking Deal With Astar Network
articles.description: By plugging into the AggLayer, Astar users will have access to the liquidity in the Polygon ecosystem, allowing cross-chain transactions between Astar and Polygon zkEVM, making the experience feel like a single chain.
